<!--
  MOVED. The publications-index source is now centralized at:
      data-raw/scripts/pages/publication-risk-management.Rmd

  That single source renders to BOTH:
      docs/index.md                          (GitHub Pages home)
      publications/risk-management/README.md (this folder's index)

  Rebuild all pages from the repository root with:
      Rscript data-raw/scripts/render.R

  Do not edit this file or README.md directly — edit the source above.
  (links.csv in this folder remains the place to add/correct public links.)
-->
